channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Family Grieves Four Deaths After Highway Accident a Day After Wedding
item.description: Tragic news has come from a family who had just celebrated a wedding a day ago. Unfortunately, an unexpected highway accident claimed the lives of four family members, leaving the household in deep mo...

item.title: Kenyans Can Now Receive National IDs Within Three Days, Murkomen Confirms
item.description: Interior CS Kipchumba Murkomen has announced a major improvement in the processing of national identity cards for Kenyans. Citizens can now obtain their IDs within three days after applying, a signifi...

item.title: Adamson Lady Falcons Rally Past UST to Stay in Final Four Race
item.description: The Adamson Lady Falcons staged a determined comeback to defeat the UST Golden Tigresses in their UAAP Season 88 women’s volleyball match, keeping their Final Four hopes alive. The game started with U...

item.title: Ottawa celebrates outdoor living at the 25th Cottage Life and Backyard Show
item.description: The 25th annual Ottawa Cottage Life and Backyard Show opened its doors this weekend, welcoming outdoor enthusiasts, homeowners, and design lovers to explore the latest trends in cottage living, landsc...

item.title: Swalwell Faces Investigation Following Sexual Assault Allegation
item.description: The Manhattan District Attorney’s Office has initiated an investigation into allegations of sexual assault against California Congressman Eric Swalwell, following a CNN report detailing a former staff...

item.title: How Kenya Could Double Its GDP and Create Jobs Through Manufacturing
item.description: In this opinion piece, Murang’a Governor Irungu Kang’ata argues that Kenya must move from political spectacle to real economic transformation by focusing squarely on growth and production. He proposes...

item.title: Wike’s Faction Regains Control of PDP National Secretariat After Police Unsealing
item.description: The Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) group backing the Minister of the Federal Capital Territory, Nyesom Wike, has now taken charge of the party’s national headquarters in Abuja after the police reopene...

item.title: Man in his 40s arrested after allegedly climbing on and damaging US Air Force C-130 at Shannon Airport
item.description: A man in his 40s has been arrested in the Republic of Ireland following an incident at Shannon Airport in County Clare, where he allegedly entered an unauthorised area and caused damage to a United St...

item.title: Master Hanz Cua shares feng shui guidance for April 12, 2026
item.description: On April 12, 2026, ABS-CBN Lifestyle featured feng shui expert Master Hanz Cua, who gave spiritual and energy-based guidance for the day. Feng shui, a traditional Chinese practice focusing on harmony ...

item.title: Funso Doherty declares interest to run for Lagos governorship under ADC in 2027
item.description: Former Peoples Democratic Party (PDP) governorship hopeful, Funso Doherty, don reveal say him go contest for the Lagos State governor position under the African Democratic Congress (ADC) come 2027 gen...

item.title: Tyson Fury defeats Arslanbek Makhmudov on points in London return, calls out Anthony Joshua
item.description: Tyson Fury marked a successful return to the ring in London with a dominant points win over Russia’s Arslanbek Makhmudov, reigniting his ambitions for a blockbuster fight with fellow Brit Anthony Josh...

item.title: Lebanon faces deadly airstrikes despite regional ceasefire
item.description: Despite a ceasefire agreement between the US and Iran, Israeli airstrikes have continued to hit Lebanon, particularly targeting Beirut and southern regions. Hundreds of bombs fell in a matter of minut...

item.title: Bhopal authorities announce redesign of problematic bridge following safety concerns
item.description: In Bhopal, a bridge that gained notoriety for its awkward 90-degree turn is finally set to be redesigned after facing months of public complaints and online outrage. This bridge, located at one of the...

item.title: Quebec Mourns Legendary Baseball Commentator Rodger Brulotte
item.description: Rodger Brulotte, a celebrated Quebec baseball commentator, passed away from cancer on March 20 at the age of 79. Known for his iconic home run call, “Bonsoir, elle est partie!”, Brulotte began his bro...

item.title: Delhi proposes phase-wise transition to electric vehicles by 2030
item.description: The Government of NCT of Delhi has unveiled the draft Electric Vehicle (EV) Policy 2026-2030, aiming to gradually phase out petrol and diesel vehicles across the city. Key highlights include the requi...

item.title: Escalating US-Iran Tensions Highlight Similarities to Hollywood Rescue Narratives
item.description: The ongoing tensions between the United States and Iran, recently marked by a precarious ceasefire and delicate negotiations, have drawn parallels to the high-stakes rescue missions often depicted in ...

item.title: Sudanese man charged after Channel deaths of four migrants
item.description: A 27-year-old Sudanese man, Alnour Mohamed Ali, has appeared before Folkestone Magistrates’ Court charged with endangering life, following the deaths of four migrants who drowned while attempting to c...

item.title: Canada Supports Iran's UN Committee Membership Despite Human Rights Concerns
item.description: The article criticizes Canada for continuing to support Iran's membership on the UN Committee for Program and Coordination (CPC), a body that oversees strategic direction and evaluates UN programs. Ad...

item.title: UNIJOS SUG Advises Students on Travel Planning Amid City Movement Restriction
item.description: The Students’ Union Government (SUG) of University of Jos (UNIJOS) don advise all students wey dey return to campus make dem plan their waka well well because movement for Jos, Plateau State, go dey r...

item.title: Tyson Fury defeats Arslanbek Makhmudov in successful return to the ring
item.description: After months away from professional boxing, British heavyweight Tyson Fury made a victorious return by defeating Russian contender Arslanbek Makhmudov in his comeback fight. The bout, which attracted ...
